message:
fix(auth): clear session hint on 401 to prevent refresh loop (#6930) (#6931)

When kc-has-session is true but the server session has expired,
/auth/refresh returns 401 but the flag was never cleared — causing
repeated 401 calls on every page load.

Now:
- /auth/refresh 401/403 clears kc-has-session (definitive no session)
- /api/me failure does NOT clear the hint (could be transient)
- Banner "Refresh Now" also clears the hint on 401/403

This makes the session hint self-healing: a stale hint is cleared on
the first definitive auth failure, preventing the infinite loop.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
